problem id: bca238ee
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(6) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(3)

examples:
  01111110 -> 10000000
  10101000 -> 00000001
  10110110 -> 10000001
  10000011 -> 00000000
  11111010 -> 10000001
  01101001 -> 01000000
  01011111 -> 11000000
  11110010 -> 10000001

query: 00100111
predicted answer: 00000000
